autoseed.description: Select personas and documents to seed into a Kiro workspace
autoseed.generateFirst: Generate personas or documents first to use autoseed.
autoseed.pasteHint: Paste this into Kiro chat. Requires an API token from the MCP Access tab.
autoseed.title: Kiro Autoseed

chat.mentionHint: Type <at> for personas, <atAll> for roundtable, or <hash> for documents
chat.tryExample: Try: "@all What do you think about our onboarding flow?"

confirmDelete.documentMessage: Are you sure you want to delete this document? This action cannot be undone.
confirmDelete.personaMessage: Are you sure you want to delete this persona? This action cannot be undone.

prototype.buttonTitle: Generate a clickable HTML prototype from this project's PRD + PR-FAQ
prototype.buttonTitleOne: Generate a clickable HTML prototype from the available document (PRD or PR-FAQ)
prototype.confirmPrdOnly: No PR-FAQ yet — the prototype will be built from the PRD only. Continue?
prototype.confirmPrfaqOnly: No PRD yet — the prototype will be built from the PR-FAQ only. Continue?
prototype.feedbackHint: Describe what to change. The PRD/PR-FAQ stays in effect; the prototype is re-centered on your feedback (e.g. “show the admin’s perspective”).
prototype.feedbackPlaceholder: e.g. Change this to the admin dashboard view — show approvals, user management, and metrics instead of the end-user screens.
prototype.feedbackTitle: Give feedback to regenerate this prototype
prototype.needsDocs: Create a PRD or a PR-FAQ first to enable prototype build
prototype.timeout: Prototype build took too long. Check the Documents tab in a moment.

importPersona.aiImportDesc: Claude will extract persona information from your {{type}} and create a structured persona with an AI-generated avatar.
importPersona.clickToUpload: Click to upload or drag and drop
importPersona.pastePlaceholder: Paste your persona description, user research notes, or any text describing the persona...
importPersona.title: Import Persona

jobs.staleMessage: No updates for 10+ minutes. Will auto-clear soon.

kiroExport.description: Configure context for "Copy to Kiro" exports
kiroExport.noPromptHint: Click "Configure" to add implementation context for PRD exports
kiroExport.templateHint: This context will be prepended to PRD/PR-FAQ documents when using "Copy to Kiro". Include your tech stack, coding standards, and implementation guidance.
kiroExport.title: Kiro Export Settings

mcp.copyTokenNow: Copy this token now — it won't be shown again.
mcp.description: Generate API tokens to connect this project to MCP-compatible clients like Kiro or VS Code.
mcp.mcpConfigHint: Add this to your mcp.json. Replace <YOUR_API_TOKEN> with a token from below.
mcp.notAvailable: MCP Access is not available yet
mcp.notAvailableDesc: The API token management endpoint has not been deployed. Deploy the backend with MCP token support to enable this feature.
mcp.noTokensHint: Generate a token to connect MCP clients to this project.
mcp.scopeRead: Read only — search feedback, view metrics
mcp.scopeReadWrite: Read & write — includes chat and document generation
mcp.title: MCP Access
mcp.tokenPasteHint: Paste this token into the Authorization header of your mcp.json or autoseed curl command.

overview.productDescriptionDesc: Describe the current product. Feeds PRD and PR/FAQ generation.
overview.remixDocumentsDesc: Combine and revise documents into new versions
overview.runResearchDesc: Deep dive into feedback with filters

personaEdit.name: Name
personaEdit.narrativePlaceholder: A story showing them in action...
personaEdit.quotePlaceholder: A quote that captures their voice...
personaEdit.title: Edit Persona

personas.addResearchNotesDesc: Document your observations, insights, and hypotheses about this persona
personas.notePlaceholder: Type your research observation or insight...
personas.notesTip: 💡 Tip: Add observations from user interviews, usability tests, or data analysis that relate to this persona.
personas.selectToView: Select a persona to view details

interview.captured: Got it — captured. What else can you tell me about the product?
interview.elaborate: Could you tell me more about that?
interview.greeting: Hi — I'll help you describe your product or service. Tell me what it is in a sentence or two, and we'll build out the rest from there.
interview.heading: Interview
interview.hint: I'll fill the form on the left as you answer.

report.description: Save a polished Product/Service Description document from the inputs above and uploaded files.
report.errorEmpty: Add at least one product context field or upload an internal document before generating a report.
report.successMessage: Open it in the Documents tab.
report.timeout: Report generation took too long. Check the Documents tab in a moment.
report.title: Generate report

product.subtitle: The information here is automatically injected into PRD & PR/FAQ generation as the current product context.
product.title: Product / Service Description

upload.dropZone: Drop files here or click to upload
upload.heading: Internal documents
upload.hint: PDF, DOCX, MD, TXT — up to 10 MB each, 20 max

wizards.amazonQuestionsHint: Answer these questions to create a customer-focused PR-FAQ. The more detail you provide, the better the output.
wizards.autofillTitle: Pre-populate the 5 questions using personas, feedback, and product context
wizards.briefEmpty: No draft — add or collect more feedback first.
wizards.briefTitle: Let AI draft the title and description from this project's feedback
wizards.documentTypeHint: Select one or both — both are generated at once.
wizards.question1Desc: Define your target customer segment. Be specific about demographics, behaviors, and characteristics.
wizards.question1Placeholder: e.g., Busy professionals aged 25-45 who order food delivery at least 3x per week...
wizards.question2Desc: Describe the pain point or unmet need. What frustrates them today? What opportunity exists?
wizards.question2Placeholder: e.g., Customers waste 10+ minutes tracking multiple delivery apps and often miss deliveries...
wizards.question2Title: What is the customer problem or opportunity?
wizards.question3Desc: State the single most compelling benefit. How will their life improve? Be specific and measurable.
wizards.question3Placeholder: e.g., Save 15 minutes per order with unified tracking and never miss a delivery again...
wizards.question3Title: What is the most important customer benefit?
wizards.question4Desc: Provide evidence: customer research, feedback data, surveys, interviews, or market analysis.
wizards.question4Placeholder: e.g., 78% of surveyed users reported frustration with tracking across multiple apps...
wizards.question4Title: How do you know what customers need or want?
wizards.question5Desc: Walk through the end-to-end experience. How will customers discover, use, and benefit from this?
wizards.question5Placeholder: e.g., Customer opens the app, sees all deliveries in one view, gets smart notifications...
wizards.question5Title: What does the customer experience look like?
wizards.researchQuestionPlaceholder: e.g., What are the main pain points...
wizards.researchSuggestEmpty: No suggestions — add or collect more feedback first.
wizards.researchSuggestPick: Tap a suggestion to use it:
wizards.researchSuggestTitle: Let AI suggest research questions from this project's feedback
wizards.selectAtLeast2: ⚠️ Select at least 2 documents to remix.
